reasons: The broker artifact supports the narrow claim that Team Broker mode records applied and queued conflict outcomes on an external public-source snapshot touched path.
The artifact should not be used to claim FastAPI upstream maintainer workflow governance.
The Phase A baseline remains caveated until helper replay proves post-change execution through the local snapshot helper.
missingTests: Independent helper-replay artifact is still required before claiming clean post-change snapshot-helper execution.
scopeConcerns: The evidence path is adopter-side and should be cited as a local snapshot governance artifact, not as upstream repository governance.
